description_long: This clock tower features a rich, dark wooden structure with a prominent arched roof and two ornate, gold-colored finials on either side. The front is dominated by a large, circular clock face with Roman numerals and classic black hands, set within a recessed archway. The body of the tower is flanked by two slender columns, and the base is broad and sturdy, providing a sense of permanence. The sides and back are plain, with the arched roof extending smoothly over the top. Decorative gold accents highlight the architectural details, especially at the finials and column bases. The overall design evokes a sense of historical elegance, reminiscent of traditional European public buildings.
description: A dark wooden clock tower with an arched roof, gold finials, and a large Roman numeral clock face set in a recessed archway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate clock face with Roman numerals, flanked by gold finials and columns.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the smooth, curved wooden roof and the profile of the gold finials.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain wooden back and the full arch of the roof, with finials visible on top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the roof curvature and finial details.
attribute_clock_face_design: The clock face is circular with a white background, featuring black Roman numerals for the hours and black minute markers. The hands are classic black, with a slender minute hand and a shorter, broader hour hand. The face is encased in glass and set within a recessed arch, with no additional decorative elements on the face itself.
